2268520.name: Divided Land
2268520.description:
Welcome to Divided Land!

Join a vast medieval world where survival is just the beginning.
Start your journey by gathering resources, crafting gear, and forging weapons. Tame wild horses, breed farm animals, and build your own settlement as you shape your character and progress through the world.
Defend against relentless undead and face off against rival players in a fight for survival and dominance.

Farming, Taming, and Breeding

Cultivate diverse crops to sustain yourself and your livestock. Use harvested grains to craft animal feed, essential for taming and maintaining healthy animals. Raise sheep for wool to craft armor, and collect milk and eggs to prepare meals that not only satisfy hunger and thirst but also provide beneficial effects in combat. Efficient farm management is key to thriving in the wildernes. Breed and care for your animals to build a strong and self-sufficient homestead.

Character Progression

Surviving in the medieval world of Divided Land is no easy task. Mastering essential skills like hunting, fishing, farming, taming, and cooking is crucial to thriving in this harsh environment. The more you use a skill or a weapon, the more proficient you become—level up over time through practice and dedication. As your skills grow, you’ll unlock new recipes, abilities, and upgrades through a dynamic skill tree, allowing you to tailor your character to your playstyle and become a true expert of the land.


The Midnight Horde

When midnight falls, the cursed awaken. Waves of undead and vile creatures rise from the shadows — towering trolls, leaping devils, fire-casting demons, goblin archers, shamans who raise fallen skeletons and countless others.
Each night brings new horrors, testing your defenses and your will to survive. Light the torches, rally your allies, and stand against the darkness — for when dawn breaks, only the strong remain!

A World of Endless Possibilities

Survival is just the beginning. As you progress, the world of Divided Land opens up with endless opportunities. Chart your own course—whether it's exploring vast lands, raiding and plundering villages, engaging in epic battles, or building a peaceful farm. Your actions matter, and every decision you make will shape your journey.

Dynamic Combat

Engage in real-time, skill-based melee combat where precision and timing are everything. With trace-based hit detection, every swing and block is tracked in real time. Master parrying and manage your stamina carefully to survive intense encounters. Whether you're battling in PvE or clashing with other players in PvP, only skill will keep you alive.

Can you achieve dominance in this immersive dangerous land?
2268520.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
